untranslatable_reason: Descending Triangle pattern detection requires multi-bar price structure analysis (flat bottom support + descending resistance line) that cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators and operators. Pattern recognition requires historical price sequence validation and trend line fitting, which are not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: This is a pure candlestick/chart pattern that requires visual/structural pattern detection. The allowed indicators (RSI, MACD, Donchian, etc.) are all lagging/oscillator based and cannot detect the geometric formation of a descending triangle. A custom pattern detector function would be needed in the backtest engine to identify: (1) a horizontal support line with multiple touches, and (2) a downward-sloping resistance line with multiple touches. The 64% bear success rate suggests downward breakout is more probable, but entry direction remains CONTEXT_DEPENDENT pending breakout direction confirmation.
